title: NIO Stock Slumps Ahead Of Q3 Results: Analyst Says Q4 Outlook Is Key But Retail Sentiment Sours
text: Retail investor sentiment toward NIO deteriorated ahead of Q3 2024 earnings results despite record delivery numbers. Stock slump reflected concerns about revenue shortfalls and margin pressures from competitive pricing environment. Key focus for Q3 earnings preview centered on company's Q4 outlook guidance more than historical quarterly results. Analyst commentary highlighted importance of delivery guidance beat or miss in determining market reaction. Retail community showed divided sentiment with bulls optimistic about ONVO brand launch and Firefly product ramp, while bears concerned about unit economics and path to profitability. Social media discussion frequently referenced macro headwinds in China EV market and competition from BYD, XPeng, and others. Upcoming earnings call transcript and management commentary on strategy crucial for restored investor confidence following sentiment deterioration.
